input.description: Powerhouse is the central network within the Sky ecosystem, dedicated to gathering and simplifying data for all users. It ensures that information is not only accessible but also easy to understand.
Powerhouse was born from the frustrations of DAO scaling issues & organizational chaos.
Powerhouse is a network that was born from the frustrations of DAO scaling issues & organizational chaos.

Powerhouse creates and distributes decentralized operational infrastructure, connecting operators, builders, and service providers into a coordinated network designed to scale new platforms for global collaboration. By providing open, event-sourced document models and shared operational tooling, the network enables independent participants to work together with full transparency and auditability — without relying on a central authority to control data or workflows.
